rows.label: qev092404_MSG0001_m
rows.name: Ah! Handyman friends of Lularita![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0001_f
rows.name: Ah! Handyman friends of Lularita![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hello, Lularita. How's the patch job on
your roof holding up? No leaks, I hope?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0003
rows.name:
No leak at all. And for free?
Still blows Lularita's mind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm glad. What is it that
brings you out here today?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0005
rows.name:
Lularita wanted to pay back
free-working friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0006
rows.name:
Came out on hunt for parts
from Whale of White.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0008
rows.name: Thanks for your help just the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0009
rows.name:
For a secret mission, there sure are
a lot of people working on this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0010
rows.name:
Is there something going
on I should know about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_JNK0010
rows.name: Lie

rows.label: qev092404_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Himeri that it's just a
crazy chain of coincidences.

rows.label: qev092404_JNK0020
rows.name: Hint

rows.label: qev092404_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that whatever it is,
Himeri is going to like it.

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0011
rows.name:
Huh... Well, they say that's
what fate is, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'm sure whatever we find will
be the sort of discovery to
bring everyone happiness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0013
rows.name: Really? Oh, I can't wait![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0014
rows.name:
Whatever this research is, I'm sure
it'll make life better for everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0015
rows.name:
Now you've got me all excited.
Shall we go have a look?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0016
rows.name:
Remember, big critters scared off
greatest warrior of Drongo Caravan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0017_m
rows.name:
Free-working handyman
friends must be careful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0017_f
rows.name:
Free-working handyman
friends must be careful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0018
rows.name: Wreckage is way, waaaaay high up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0019
rows.name:
Lularita know it will be tough, so good
luck ducking and weaving through attacks
long enough to get nice lady her present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0020_m
rows.name: Friend found nice present? Good work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092404_MSG0020_f
rows.name: Friend found nice present? Good work![ST:wait ]
